query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meetings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  hostId INT NOT NULL,
  scheduledAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  duration INT DEFAULT 60 NOT NULL,
  timezone VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'America/New_York',
  status ENUM('scheduled', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'scheduled' NOT NULL,
  provider ENUM('daily', 'teams', 'custom') DEFAULT 'daily' NOT NULL,
  roomUrl TEXT,
  roomName VARCHAR(255),
  providerMeetingId VARCHAR(255),
  isRecorded BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  recordingUrl TEXT,
  waitingRoomEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  maxParticipants INT DEFAULT 100,
  isRecurring BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  recurrenceRule VARCHAR(255),
  parentMeetingId INT,
  metadata JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  endedAt TIMESTAMP NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS meetings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  hostId INT NOT NULL,
  scheduledAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  duration INT DEFAULT 60 NOT NULL,

  status ENUM('scheduled', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'scheduled' NOT NULL,
  provider ENUM('daily', 'teams', 'custom') DEFAULT 'daily' NOT NULL,
  roomUrl TEXT,
  roomName VARCHAR(255),
  providerMeetingId VARCHAR(255),
  isRecorded BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  recordingUrl TEXT,
  waitingRoomEnabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  maxParticipants INT DEFAULT 100,
  isRecurring BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  recurrenceRule VARCHAR(255),
  parentMeetingId INT,
  metadata JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  endedAt TIMESTAMP NULL
);
